places.place_editorial_summary: Fun lights on the Morrison Bridge!
Towering 28ft light sculptures features an elegant steel Dandelion by day, and a mesmerizing LED firework by night. An immersive, glowing spectacle.
Part immersive sculpture, part sensory instrument, The TUNNEL is more than an installation—it’s a cosmic passage through the imagination.
Meet "Billy" the loving name given to this giant sparkling illuminated cuttlefish brought to life! Standing 8 feet tall and stretching 15 feet long
Glowing flowers bloom where you least expect, transforming ordinary planters into moments of wonder.
Many different sizes of circles working together can create something more. Control a circle and create something bigger.

places.place_name: Black Light Queen of the Night
places.place_editorial_summary: A walk thru black light experience featuring a magical bloom that lasts for just one night
Quantum Jungle playfully visualizes Quantum Physics phenomena on a wall filled with thousands of touch-sensitive springs and lights.
Join the spirit of the Shadow Forest. Who knows what you will find.
Brains are overrated! Come melt your mind as you peer into the Mind Melter 6000! Note: Please clean up your own melted mind. Mop and bucket provided.
GLOW WITH THE FLOW invites you to find beauty amid chaos. This interactive fluid simulation turns your movement into a masterpiece, so start swirling!
This piece explores the feel of resilience; to burn, not be destroyed, and to return; Facets and Small Matters is about what survives to be reborn.
This artwork uses light to explore how small changes grow into something larger. Move your hands over the control area to change scale.
A playful light and sound installation where glowing droplets echo mitosis—responding to button touch and merging into a shared musical conversation.
Ascension is an 8-foot mirrored pyramid experienced with an AR headset, revealing intricate geometric patterns and infinite vertical light.
Walk through a tiny house transformed into a disco cloud forest where enchanted birds, flowers, and mysterious beings keep watch over nightly revels
Radiolarian is a mobile, interactive, scale model of a microscopic plankton called a radiolarian.
A friendly inflatable garden serpent who glows from within. Stroll under his arches and discover the images hidden in his scales.
In a dark world, it only takes a little bit of light to make a big difference. Take turns adding your own light to this interactive display.
'within a grain' explores how tiny elements shape vast systems, weaving light, memory, energy, and our role as both consumer and steward.
Saily rotating selection of music-related anagrams originating from the name of a music club "Paradise Blue" in the windows of World Trade Center.
A celebration of music and color.
A larger than life lampshade inviting reflection, wonder, and quiet togetherness.
A glass threshold can create moments of clarity and opposing moments of unease. Take a moment, sit or stand and experience being in the threshold.
The Chromosphere is interactive, animated, LED-covered sphere that you can stand inside and affect the patterns with sound.
Whisper your wish into a microphone and watch it move along a thread of light to illuminate the Wish Amplifier in a dazzling display.
Moving bodies are transformed into vibrant, luminous films that dance across buildings, enchanting audiences of all ages.

Partybot loves you so much they need to express it with huge animated billboards! Bask in the warm glow of Partybot’s loving affirmations!
Lie under the Portal and let it transport you to another space and time.
SUBSURFACE LIGHT is a 3D projection-mapping animation that transforms a wall to reveal what lies just beneath the surface and what emerges at viewers.
Onward and Outward affirms a universe where growth, change, and expansion are constant, and where every ending feeds into another beginning.
Pixel Drift explores the space between pixels and their connection to the analog world we live in, we invite you to come be part of that journey.
Twisty Maurice returns to PDXWLF with a glowing lattice of light, mirrors, and motion where math and code ripple into hypnotic patterns.

places.place_name: Workshop: PGE Project Zero Makerspace at World Trade Center

Synthesthesia Crystals is an light art sculpture of massive, music reactive infinity crystals!

Electric Avenue is a series of LED-neon-tube signs in the look and feel of cyberpunk, retro-futuristic neon-light-covered streets.
Immerse yourself in RAIN by artist Dave Meeker. Share in the joy of rain, the abundance of which is one of the things that makes Portland unique.
Delicate & nearly gone. Explore an AR scavenger hunt that brings threatened native plants & their place in our ecosystems back into view.
A glowing chest that moves and opens/closes its lid. Inside are large teeth and a floppy tongue. Beneath the chest are many small feet.
Engage with a journey across imagined worlds as seen through costumes created by Portland Opera. Each costume tells a story!

places.place_name: Live Music: Portland Opera Presents: Queen of the Night Aria at World Trade Center
places.place_editorial_summary: A timeless classic on the World Trade Center Plaza: Mozart's Queen of the Night Aria, presented in sparkling lights by Portland Opera!

places.place_editorial_summary: Music from all around the world.

Your own cellular geometry's structure. Step inside and be reminded that every cell in your body is setup to receive and transmit love.
